tool.analyze.userDescription: Analyzes function/class structure and highlights in the editor
tool.drilldown.userDescription: Asks the user for questions or instructions
tool.highlight.userDescription: Adds line annotations and block explanations to code
tool.export.userDescription: Saves walkthrough results as JSON / Markdown files
tool.findSymbol.userDescription: Searches for symbols (functions/classes) by name in the workspace
tool.listSymbols.userDescription: Lists symbols in a file or folder (for batch processing)
config.enableDebugLog.description: Enable debug logging to .code-walker-debug.log and Output Channel
config.enableLineTracking.description: Automatically adjust block line numbers when the file is edited
config.notificationTimeoutSeconds.descri: Auto-dismiss timeout for non-interactive notifications in seconds (0 keeps them persistent)
config.templateLabels.description: Label template candidates for block editing
config.defaultColor.description: Default color index for new Manual blocks (0=Blue, 1=Green, 2=Purple, 3=Orange, 4=Red, 5=Cyan)
config.skipPatterns.description: File/directory patterns to skip during batch processing (regex)
config.extensions.description: File extensions to target during batch processing
